title: Heritage Foods Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Heritage Foods Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!
